languages.text: "Поразительно!" {n}Эоганн не выглядит испуганным или ошеломленным — скорее, крайне заинтересованным. {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Сервочереп{/g} Нунциус безмятежно парит над его плечом.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, это совершенно незаурядное нарушение закона причинности. О, если бы мне удалось отыскать агрегат, что способен претворять в жизнь подобные эффекты!"

traits.locale_text: "Поразительно!" {n}Эоганн не выглядит испуганным или ошеломленным — скорее, крайне заинтересованным. {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Сервочереп{/g} Нунциус безмятежно парит над его плечом.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, это совершенно незаурядное нарушение закона причинности. О, если бы мне удалось отыскать агрегат, что способен претворять в жизнь подобные эффекты!"
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "Astounding!" {n}Eogunn does not appear frightened or shocked, but rather utterly captivated. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} Nuncius hovers sedately at his shoulder.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is a wholly extraordinary violation of the law of causality. Oh, if only I could discover a machine that could realise such effects!"
languages.original_text: "Поразительно!" {n}Эоганн не выглядит испуганным или ошеломленным — скорее, крайне заинтересованным. {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Сервочереп{/g} Нунциус безмятежно парит над его плечом.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, это совершенно незаурядное нарушение закона причинности. О, если бы мне удалось отыскать агрегат, что способен претворять в жизнь подобные эффекты!"

The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} Nuncius hovers sedately at his shoulder.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is a wholly extraordinary violation of the law of causality. Oh, if only I could discover a machine that could realise such effects!"

languages.text: “太惊人了！”{n}伊奥贡看起来既不害怕也不震惊，反倒像是被彻底迷住了。{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}努恩修斯静静悬在他的肩头。{/n}“舰长大人，这简直是对因果律的彻底颠覆。啊，要是我能找到一台能实现这种效果的机器就好了！”
languages.original_text: "Astounding!" {n}Eogunn does not appear frightened or shocked, but rather utterly captivated. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} Nuncius hovers sedately at his shoulder.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is a wholly extraordinary violation of the law of causality. Oh, if only I could discover a machine that could realise such effects!"

traits.locale_text: “太惊人了！”{n}伊奥贡看起来既不害怕也不震惊，反倒像是被彻底迷住了。{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}努恩修斯静静悬在他的肩头。{/n}“舰长大人，这简直是对因果律的彻底颠覆。啊，要是我能找到一台能实现这种效果的机器就好了！”

languages.text: « Incroyable ! » {n}Loin d'être effrayé ou choqué, Eogunn semble captivé par cet étrange phénomène. Le {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} Nuncius plane tranquillement à côté de son épaule.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, il s'agit là d'une violation proprement extraordinaire des lois de la causalité. Oh, si seulement je pouvais découvrir une machine capable de produire de tels effets ! »
languages.original_text: "Astounding!" {n}Eogunn does not appear frightened or shocked, but rather utterly captivated. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} Nuncius hovers sedately at his shoulder.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is a wholly extraordinary violation of the law of causality. Oh, if only I could discover a machine that could realise such effects!"

traits.locale_text: « Incroyable ! » {n}Loin d'être effrayé ou choqué, Eogunn semble captivé par cet étrange phénomène. Le {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} Nuncius plane tranquillement à côté de son épaule.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, il s'agit là d'une violation proprement extraordinaire des lois de la causalité. Oh, si seulement je pouvais découvrir une machine capable de produire de tels effets ! »

languages.text: "İnanılmaz!" {n}Eogunn; korkmuş veya şaşırmış gibi değil, aksine tam anlamıyla büyülenmiş gibi görünüyor. {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Hizmelet{/g} Nuncius, hafifçe omzunda süzülüyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Bu, nedensellik yasasının doğrudan olağanüstü bir ihlalidir. Keşke böyle etkiler yaratabilecek bir makine keşfedebilsem!"
languages.original_text: "Astounding!" {n}Eogunn does not appear frightened or shocked, but rather utterly captivated. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} Nuncius hovers sedately at his shoulder.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is a wholly extraordinary violation of the law of causality. Oh, if only I could discover a machine that could realise such effects!"

traits.locale_text: "İnanılmaz!" {n}Eogunn; korkmuş veya şaşırmış gibi değil, aksine tam anlamıyla büyülenmiş gibi görünüyor. {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Hizmelet{/g} Nuncius, hafifçe omzunda süzülüyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Bu, nedensellik yasasının doğrudan olağanüstü bir ihlalidir. Keşke böyle etkiler yaratabilecek bir makine keşfedebilsem!"

languages.text: «¡Asombroso!». {n}Eogunn no parece asustado ni conmocionado, sino completamente fascinado. Su {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g}, Nuncius, flota tranquilamente junto a su hombro.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, esta es una infracción extraordinaria de la causalidad. ¡Ah, si tan solo pudiera descubrir una máquina capaz de semejantes efectos!»
languages.original_text: "Astounding!" {n}Eogunn does not appear frightened or shocked, but rather utterly captivated. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} Nuncius hovers sedately at his shoulder.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is a wholly extraordinary violation of the law of causality. Oh, if only I could discover a machine that could realise such effects!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Asombroso!». {n}Eogunn no parece asustado ni conmocionado, sino completamente fascinado. Su {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g}, Nuncius, flota tranquilamente junto a su hombro.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, esta es una infracción extraordinaria de la causalidad. ¡Ah, si tan solo pudiera descubrir una máquina capaz de semejantes efectos!»

languages.text: "Erstaunlich!" {n}Eogunn wirkt nicht erschrocken oder schockiert, sondern vollkommen fasziniert. Der {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} Nuncius schwebt ruhig über seiner Schulter.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, das ist eine außerordentliche Verletzung des Gesetzes von Ursache und Wirkung. Oh, würde ich doch nur eine Maschine entdecken, die derartige Effekte erzeugt!"
languages.original_text: "Astounding!" {n}Eogunn does not appear frightened or shocked, but rather utterly captivated. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} Nuncius hovers sedately at his shoulder.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is a wholly extraordinary violation of the law of causality. Oh, if only I could discover a machine that could realise such effects!"

traits.locale_text: "Erstaunlich!" {n}Eogunn wirkt nicht erschrocken oder schockiert, sondern vollkommen fasziniert. Der {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} Nuncius schwebt ruhig über seiner Schulter.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, das ist eine außerordentliche Verletzung des Gesetzes von Ursache und Wirkung. Oh, würde ich doch nur eine Maschine entdecken, die derartige Effekte erzeugt!"

languages.text: 「驚愕だ！」{n}エオグンは恐怖や驚きではなく、完全に魅了されている。{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}サーボスカル{/g}ヌンシウスは彼の肩に静かに浮いている。{/n}「貴方様、これは因果律の全く異例な違反です。ああ、もしもそのような効果を実現できる機械を発見できれば…」
languages.original_text: "Astounding!" {n}Eogunn does not appear frightened or shocked, but rather utterly captivated. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} Nuncius hovers sedately at his shoulder.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is a wholly extraordinary violation of the law of causality. Oh, if only I could discover a machine that could realise such effects!"
